short.en: DS18B20 inside the fridge, ESP32-C3 outside; pushes temperature to a local dashboard and alerts on excursion.
short.sl: DS18B20 v hladilniku, ESP32-C3 zunaj; pošilja temperaturo na lokalno nadzorno ploščo in opozarja ob odstopanju.

description.en: Caught a failing fridge before food spoiled. Probe is sealed in PETG with food-safe silicone, cable goes through the door gasket without bending the seal. Threshold and hysteresis are configurable via the web UI.
description.sl: Zaznal je odpoved hladilnika, preden se je hrana pokvarila. Sonda je zatesnjena v PETG-u s silikonom, primernim za živila, kabel poteka skozi tesnilo vrat brez upogiba tesnila. Prag in histereza nastavljiva prek spletne aplikacije.
